The Oxford Shirt, Refined.

Crafted from premium Oxford cloth with timeless proportions and meticulous attention to detail. Inspired by classic Ivy League style.

Lifestyle Image

Built to last a lifetime.

Heritage

Designed for
a Lifetime

Inspired by traditional Ivy style, every VEYLMONT shirt is designed with refined proportions, substantial Oxford fabric, and details that improve with age.

We believe the best shirts are not bought — they are acquired. Worn, washed, softened over years. A VEYLMONT shirt is made to become yours in the truest sense.

100%

Oxford Cotton

8+

Construction Details

India

Crafted In

The Standard

Why VEYLMONT

Premium Oxford Fabric

Substantial weight and texture designed to age beautifully. The classic basket weave that defines the Oxford shirt.

Signature Collar Roll

Traditional button-down collar engineered for a natural, effortless roll — the hallmark of the authentic OCBD.

Tailored Fit

Balanced proportions designed for comfort and elegance. Neither fashion-forward nor boxy — simply correct.

Small-Batch Production

Quality over quantity. Every shirt is made in limited batches to ensure uncompromising attention to detail.

Construction

Every Detail, Considered

Seam detail

01

Single Needle Construction

Each seam is sewn with a single needle for a cleaner, stronger finish. A mark of quality that most shirts abandon in favour of speed.

Collar detail

02

Button-Down Collar

The collar points are fastened with mother-of-pearl buttons, allowing a natural roll to form across the front placket — the defining detail of the Oxford tradition.

Embroidery detail

03

Chest Embroidery

A discreet embroidered mark on the chest — present only as a quiet signal of provenance, never as decoration.

Yoke detail

04

Double-Layer Yoke

The back yoke is cut on the bias and doubled for structure and drape. It provides the foundation for the shirt's silhouette across the shoulder.

Back detail

05

Box Pleat & Hanger Loop

A box pleat at the centre back provides ease of movement. An internal hanger loop preserves the collar when the shirt is stored.

Cuff detail

06

Adjustable Cuffs & Flat-Felled Seams

Button cuffs with an extra button for adjustability. All side seams are flat-felled — sewn twice, folded flat, and finished clean inside and out.

The Material

Substantial
Oxford Cloth

Woven from premium cotton Oxford fabric, the shirt develops character and softness over time while maintaining its structure.

The distinctive basket weave creates a surface that holds its shape through washing, pressing, and years of wear — becoming more itself with every wash.

100%Cotton
TailoredFit
TimelessConstruction

Process

From Cloth to Shirt

01

Fabric Selection

We source Oxford cloth from premium mills — substantial in weight, consistent in weave, and verified to meet our quality standard before a single cut is made.

02

Pattern Engineering

Our block pattern is refined over multiple fittings to achieve balanced proportions — correct chest width, sleeve pitch, and collar geometry.

03

Precision Construction

Each shirt is sewn with single-needle stitching on critical seams, flat-felled side seams, and hand-finished collar interlinings.

04

Final Inspection

Every finished shirt is inspected against a 22-point checklist — seam alignment, button tension, collar roll, and overall symmetry.

05

Small-Batch Production

We produce in small batches to maintain quality and attention to detail at every stage. Each run is numbered and tracked from fabric to finished garment.

Philosophy

Quiet Confidence.

True style is not loud. It is timeless. VEYLMONT creates garments intended to be worn, appreciated, and passed on.
